response:
strongest = extensions[0]
    max_strength = sum(1 if c.isupper() else -1 if c.islower() else 0 for c in strongest)

    for ext in extensions[1:]:
        strength = sum(1 if c.isupper() else -1 if c.islower() else 0 for c in ext)
        if strength > max_strength:
            strongest = ext
            max_strength = strength

    return class_name + "." + strongest
